title: WorldBender
description: Mass building on the client side with vanilla commands, meaning it is usable on any server you have OP on.
body:
This allows you to set large quantities of blocks, make ellipsoids / spheres, and more!

You may be asking "Why would I want this?". Well, you might want this because it works on **any** server you have op on, and doesn't have any size limitations!

Do note: Some commands, like the sphere command, may freeze your game for a small amount of time while it calculates.


Commands (ALL OF THESE REQUIRE OP AND/OR CREATIVE MODE):
```
cmdspd: Change command speed
pos1: Set position 1 to current position
pos2: Set position 2 to current position
pyramid: Make pyramid of ___ with height ___ at current position
replace: Replace ___ in selection with ___
set: Set selection to ___
sphere: Make ellipsoid of ___ within selection
line: Make line of ___ between position 1 and position 2
gateway: get an end gateway that teleports you to ___
```

Another way to select is with a debug stick!
